news.t: Blockmate Advances Wyoming USA AI Data Centre Opportunity

overview.description: The Man Active Trend Enhanced ETF (MATE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund aims to actively combine US equity market exposure with a systematic trend-following overlay in global futures markets. The fund uses leverage to create 100% exposure to each strategy. MATE was launched on Dec 16, 2025 and is issued by Man.

data.title: Blockmate Advances Wyoming USA AI Data Centre Opportunity
data.text: Toronto, Ontario--(Newsfile Corp. - June 16, 2026) - Blockmate Ventures Inc. (TSXV: MATE) (OTCQB: MATEF) (FSE: 8MH) ("Blockmate" or the "Company"), a venture builder focused on AI, Bitcoin, and digita...
